memory.what_this_project_is: A legacy business concept to help women leaving prison access remote-work opportunities by training them in VA skills and giving them access to equipment, internet, guidance, and workspace.
memory.origin: ~20 years of VA work on PeoplePerHour, Upwork, Fiverr, LinkedIn. Seeing women in prison education ask how they could get similar work after release.
problem_observed: No clear path from prison training to earning outside
proposed_solution: Grants for PCs, laptops, and Wi-Fi
Templates for profiles, cover letters, and applications
evidence_available: Prior YouTube tutorials on Upwork/PeoplePerHour profiles
Early demand from people asking for help
Government/charity funding context around reoffending reduction
memory.filing_status: ARCHIVE — Future social-enterprise project / case-study concept
memory.next_action: Archive with evidence, audience notes, funding route, and possible future version plan
